chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 727 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2995/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. Lastly this matter was fixed in Court on 19-04-2023, when the Counsel for the Petitioners was directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this Petition raised by the office. Thereafter no concrete efforts were made either by the Petitioners nor their Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court. Today, one again, nobody has turned up to proceed with this matter, which is pending since 2023 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
